summary: Diff adds a Design B themed frontend with TanStack Router routes, a Design B app shell (header + bottom tabs), a runtime theme switcher backed by localStorage and CSS variable overrides via data-design-theme, and mock placeholder data for user profile and health metrics. Evidence for generating/adding the required static image assets under frontend/public/assets/generated is not present in the provided diff summary (may be in omitted files). Several extra infrastructure files (backend actor stub and query/actor hooks) appear unrelated to the UI Design B request.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and add the required static images under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the Design B UI.
missing_requirements.reason: The UI references /assets/generated/healthcare-logo.dim_512x512.png, but the diff summary does not show any added files under frontend/public/assets/generated. Because some files are omitted, the assets may exist but are not evidenced here.
evidence: <file-diff>: Omitted files due to limits: added=9

hallucinated_features.description: Added an empty backend Motoko actor (actor {}) without any requested backend changes.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest focuses on an alternative frontend UI design and image assets; no new backend implementation was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Added React Query-based actor/query hooks (useActor/useQueries) that are described as scaffolding for future backend integration.
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend integration scaffolding was not requested; requirements explicitly allow placeholder content without backend integration.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced next-themes ThemeProvider wrapping the app.
hallucinated_features.reason: Only a Design B vs default design toggle was requested; using next-themes/dark-mode infrastructure was not explicitly requested.
